mapper.insert: insert into flash_sale_activity (activity_name, dish_id, sale_price, stock, available_stock, limit_per_user, start_time, end_time, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{activityName}, #{dishId}, #{salePrice}, #{stock}, #{availableStock}, #{limitPerUser}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select:
select f.id, f.activity_name as activityName, f.dish_id as dishId, d.name as dishName, d.image as dishImage, d.price as originalPrice, f.sale_price as salePrice, f.stock as stock, f.available_stock as availableStock, f.limit_per_user as limitPerUser, f.start_time as startTime, f.end_time as endTime, f.status as status from flash_sale_activity f inner join dish d on f.dish_id = d.id
and f.activity_name like concat('%', #{activityName}, '%')
and d.name like concat('%', #{dishName}, '%')
and f.status = #{status}
order by f.create_time desc

select f.id, f.activity_name as activityName, f.dish_id as dishId, d.name as dishName, d.image as dishImage, d.price as originalPrice, f.sale_price as salePrice, f.stock as stock, f.available_stock as availableStock, f.limit_per_user as limitPerUser, f.start_time as startTime, f.end_time as endTime, f.status as status from flash_sale_activity f inner join dish d on f.dish_id = d.id where f.id = #{id}

select f.id, f.activity_name as activityName, f.dish_id as dishId, d.name as dishName, d.image as dishImage, d.price as originalPrice, f.sale_price as salePrice, f.stock as stock, f.available_stock as availableStock, f.limit_per_user as limitPerUser, f.start_time as startTime, f.end_time as endTime, f.status as status from flash_sale_activity f inner join dish d on f.dish_id = d.id where f.status = 1 and d.status = 1 and f.start_time <= #{now} and f.end_time >= #{now} order by f.start_time asc, f.id desc
